description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: former department store chain in Chicago
description_wiki: Wieboldt Stores, Inc., also known as Wieboldt's, did business as a Chicago general retailer between 1883 and 1987.
Spiegel was an American direct marketing retailer founded in 1865 by Joseph Spiegel.
Wisconsin Dells (formerly Kilbourn) is a city in Columbia, Sauk, Adams and Juneau counties in the U.S. state of Wisconsin.

description: federal holiday in the United States of America for honoring and mourning the U.S. military personnel who died while serving in the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: Memorial Day is a federal holiday in the United States for mourning the U.S. military personnel who died while serving in the United States Armed Forces.

description: public holiday in the United States
description_wiki: Labor Day is a federal holiday in the United States celebrated on the first Monday of September to honor and recognize the American labor movement and the works and contributions of laborers to the development and achievements in the United States.

description: department store chain in the United States
description_wiki: Macy's IP Holdings, LLC doing business as Macy's, is an American department store chain founded in 1858 by Rowland Hussey Macy.
The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: island in the Mediterranean, region of Italy
description_wiki: Sicily (Italian and Sicilian: Sicilia), officially the Sicilian Region, is an island in the central Mediterranean Sea and one of the twenty regions of Italy, situated south of the Italian Peninsula in continental Europe.

description: island in New York Harbor in the United States of America
description_wiki: Ellis Island is an island in New York Harbor, within the U.S. states of New Jersey and New York.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki:
Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Arizona is a landlocked state in the Southwestern United States, sharing the Four Corners region with Colorado, New Mexico, and Utah.
